title: Kunjal Mata Temple
tagline: Kunjal Mata Temple — spiritual town of Rajasthan

overview.short: Kunjal Mata Temple of goddess Kunjal is located in Deh village of Jayal tehsil in Nagaur district of Rajasthan, India, and 1.3 km (1 mi) away from Deh's Bus Station on Nagaur-Ladnu
overview.description: Kunjal Mata Temple of goddess Kunjal is located in Deh village of Jayal tehsil in Nagaur district of Rajasthan, India, and 1.3 km (1 mi) away from Deh's Bus Station on Nagaur-Ladnun National Highway-65. Kunjal Mata is kul devi of Pareek Brahmin's (Joshi, Kanthadia, Sakraniya and many other Pareek gotras). Temple area is 38 Bigha. It is A Historical Place of Rajasthan.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kunjal Mata Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kunjal Mata Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kunjal Mata Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bikaner Airport (Nal) (110 km) and the nearest railway station is Bikaner Junction (98 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kunjal Mata Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kunjal Mata Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kunjal Mata Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kunjal Mata Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kunjal Mata Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Deh, India.
